name: Sayori - Helping her through her depression!
description:
In which Sayori opens up to you about her problems, so now you must help her in her struggles.

Hello! This is my very first bot, so don’t expect the best from it, haha!

This is my contribution to @GhostOfOmi’s challenge! And if Omi is reading this, you have no clue how happy it makes me to know you’re looking at my bot.

Edit: HOLY- 500+ CHATS WITHIN A DAY?! I’VE BEEN BLESSED BY THE JANITOR AI GODS!

Tested:Yes/No

Character used in testing: Yuri

You DON’T have to have a Yuri persona to chat with this bot, btw! This is ANYPOV, meaning you can be absolutely anyone!!

Message 1: Gender-neutral user

Message 2: Male user

Message 3: Female user

I would appreciate NO criticism in the comments. Thanks!

Thank you in advance to EVERYONE who happens to stumble across this! I look forward to seeing the results~
creator: inkxsanity
